_comment: SOURCE OF TRUTH: infrastructure/ecs.tf (Terraform). This file is the
non-Terraform fallback path — used only when registering a task definition
directly via the AWS CLI without running `terraform apply`.
registering. executionRoleArn MUST grant secretsmanager:GetSecretValue on
ALL secret ARNs below, or ECS cannot inject them and the task crashes at
validateEnv(). Each secret needs its OWN distinct ARN.
taskRoleArn MUST grant any AWS API permissions the container code uses

secrets._comment: PEM-encoded RDS CA bundle. Required when DATABASE_URL uses ?sslmode=verify-full.
secrets.name: DATABASE_SSL_CA

secrets._comment: Optional — Sentry SDK is a no-op when DSN is absent.
secrets.name: SENTRY_DSN

secrets._comment: Optional — RevenueCat entitlement check is bypassed when absent.
secrets.name: REVENUECAT_REST_API_KEY

secrets._comment: Optional — Vertex AI routes return a clear error at runtime when absent.
secrets.name: GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT

secrets._comment: Service-account key JSON for Vertex AI ADC. ops/entrypoint.sh writes it to /tmp/gcp-sa.json and exports GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS.
secrets.name: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS_JSON
